mapper.insert: insert into import_job_log(job_id, job_code, trigger_type, status, message, started_at) values(#{jobId}, #{jobCode}, #{triggerType}, #{status}, #{message}, #{startedAt})
mapper.update: update import_job_log set status = #{status}, message = #{message}, total_lines = #{totalLines}, success_lines = #{successLines}, failed_lines = #{failedLines}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} where id = #{id}
